remarks: Please submit HIGHEST and BEST OFFERS by Tuesday June 9th at 5pm. At the end of a long shared driveway that feels like a cul de sac this South Wilton 4/5 bedroom Colonial blends classic charm with meaningful modern updates - and it's move-in ready. Step inside the foyer where newly installed hardwood floors flow through the living room and dining room, setting a fresh tone throughout. At the heart of the home, a beautifully renovated kitchen delivers fresh finishes and updated fixtures that balance style with everyday functionality - the kind of space that makes morning routines and dinner parties equally enjoyable. Four generous bedrooms are served by a full bath upstairs plus an additional room that could be converted to another bathroom. There is second full bath located on the main floor, Step outside and discover one of this property's most exciting features - an expansive, cleared backyard that's a rare find in Wilton. Whether you're envisioning summer barbecues on the bluestone patio, space for the little ones to roam, or the pool you've always dreamed of, this yard delivers. A pool permit is already in place, so your outdoor oasis is ready to become a reality without delay. With a brand new roof installed in 2024, the big-ticket items are already handled. All of this in sought-after Wilton - celebrated for its top-rated schools, charming village center, and easy Merritt Parkway and Metro-North access. This is Fairfield County living at its finest.
